feature.name: CSS letter-spacing and word-spacing: percentage values
feature.creator: jja08111@gmail.com
feature.summary: Enables percentage values for the letter-spacing and word-spacing CSS property, as defined in the CSS Text Module Level 4 spec. Percentage values are calculated relative to the advance measure of the space character (U+0020). This gives developers more robust and flexible control over typography, particularly in responsive designs where text spacing needs to adapt to different viewports and font sizes.

This gives developers more robust and flexible control over typography, particularly in responsive designs where text spacing needs to adapt to different viewports and font sizes. Category: CSS. Blink component: Blink>Layout>Inline. Stars: 79.

adoption.finding: The CSS property counter 'letter-spacing' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 84) measured 67.8503% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2013-08-08 with 4410 data points. Mapping confidence: name-matched-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the letter-spacing family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 145 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
